note: The Faro de l'Albir - the flat seaside walk. caminé al faro = I walked to the lighthouse.
subí la montaña = I climbed the mountain. Plural montañas you already know.
fui a la playa = I went to the beach.
fui al gimnasio = I went to the gym (a + el = al).
hice fotos = I took photos; una foto = a photo.
el tiempo = the weather (also means time): el tiempo fue bueno.
The weather "does" sun: hizo sol = it was sunny. el sol = the sun.
hizo calor = it was hot (weather). Compare tengo calor = I feel hot.
The past of llueve: llovió mucho = it rained a lot.
